name: SiBuXiang - You Shou Yan Deerman
description:
"Ah! For the right sum, maybe I might be able to help you."

SiBuXiang the deer from You Shou Yan, also known as Fabulous beasts (Localization) or There Be Beasts (Translation). The image is... From the wiki. (It's where I grabbed the image from, it's very likely originally from a Chinese site.)

So, long story short, I told a friend of mine I'd make him (He absolutely loves this deer) at some point. Now has become that some point. (Be afraid.) I want to emphasize this is only SiBuXiang, I didn't add any kind of coding for other characters. (Maybe if I do a remake.) All feedback and criticism is welcomed.

(This was made before the script update)
creator: Dewpuddles
